title: MAN Commends FG’s “Nigeria First” Policy Directive, Calls for Joint Efforts to Ensure Effective and Sustainable Implementation - FinancialEDGE
description: The Manufacturers Association of Nigeria (MAN) has commended the Federal Government of Nigeria on its "NigeriaFirst" policy directive aimed at prioritizing patronage of made-in-Nigeria goods and services, and development of local content, which borders on appropriate technical knowledge transfer to Nigerian professionals. According to the Director General of the Association, Mr. Segun Ajayi-Kadir mni this
html: The Manufacturers Association of Nigeria (MAN) has  commended the Federal Government of Nigeria on its “NigeriaFirst” policy directive aimed at prioritizing patronage of made-in-Nigeria goods and services, and development of local content, which borders on appropriate technical knowledge transfer to Nigerian professionals.
